titleStmt.title: SII 38.152: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 152. (A.R. No. 152 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the fifteenth pillar, central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged. Only the later portion of the meykīrtti of the king is preserved here. It records that a taḷiyilāḷ, (a dancing girl) Nakkaṉ Poṉ ••••••• of Tirukkāṉappērūr in Tirukkāṉappērūr-nāḍu in Rājarājapāṇḍi-nāḍu donated ninety sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god (uḍaiyār) in Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻal-nāḍu in Puḻal-kōṭṭam (sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam. Other details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
lines 1-21 are damaged
naṉṉi nuḷampaṉu miṉṉumivar mutaliyar Eṇṇilirai
carai viṇṇakka teṟṟi vaṉṉiyirevaṉ vayappa
ṭaittuttaṉum coṉṉavil paṭaikkuṇṭaḷi mayaṉum
Eṉṟiṉa varaicaroṭañciya caḷukkikulakula kulai
ntu talaimayir virittu muṉṉuṟa neḷuttu piṉṉuṟa
nokkik kāl paṟin=toṭi mel kaṭal pāyta
turattiyapoḻutuc cerukkaḷattavaṉ viṭu catturupayaṅkaraṉ
karapattiraṉ mutal pattiracātipakaṭṭarai cineka Eṭṭu naṭai parikaḷum Oṭṭaka niraikaḷum varāka velkoṭi muta
l Irācapariccannamum Oppil ceppil Avvai cāṅkappai yeṉṟivar mutaliṉar teviyar kuḻāmum pāvai
yariṭṭamum miṉaiyaṉa piṟavum muṉaivaiyiṟ koṇṭu vijayaabhiṣekam paṇṇit teṉṟicai
vaiyiṟporppaṭai naṭātti kārkkaṭalilaṅkaiyil viṟaṟpaṭaik kaliṅkamaṉ viracalāmekaṉaik kaṭark
kaḷiṟṟoṭum paṭakkatir muṭikavittu Ilaṅkaiyiṟkiṟaivaṉ māpaparaṉaṉRead mānāparaṇaṉ kātalariruvaraikaḷa
ttiṭaippiṭittu māpperumpukaḻ mikavaḷartta kopparakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyar śrī rājendradeva
ṟku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu rājarājappāṇṭināṭṭut tirukkāṉappeṟūrnāṭṭut tirukkāṉappe
ṟūrt taḷiyilāḷ nakkaṉ poṉ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu puḻakkoṭṭa
ttup puḻalnāṭṭut tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiya tirunan=tā viḷakku Oṉṟinukkut toṇṇūṟāṭu koṇ
ṭu Ittevar tiripuvaṉa cceri kaṇavati ceriyāṉa koṭuvaṉtu
ṉ koṇṭa Āṭu nāṟpattāṟu
tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiya maṅkaiyum meṟpaṭi viḷakku meṟppaṭi kacaṅ Damaged.
Digital edition of SII 38.152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
